name: Pumpkin Swirl Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small mixing bowl, combine the filling ingredients. Beat at medium speed, scraping the bowl often, until well mixed (1-2 minutes). Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the sugar, oil, water, pumpkin, and eggs. Beat at low speed, scraping often, until the mixture is smooth (1-2 minutes).
4. Continue beating at medium speed, gradually adding all the remaining bread ingredients and scraping the bowl often, until well mixed (1-2 minutes).
5. Pour 1/4 (about 2 cups) of the pumpkin batter into each of two greased and floured 9 x 5 inch loaf pans.
6. Carefully spread half of the filling mixture over the batter in each pan.
7. Top with half of the remaining pumpkin batter.
8. Use a knife or spatula to pull through the batter and filling, creating a swirl effect.
9. Bake for 65-70 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from pans. Allow to cool completely.
